use_cases: Displaying a portfolio of images in an interactive circular layout that responds to scroll
Creating an engaging product showcase that auto-rotates when idle and reacts to user scrolling
Building a visually captivating collection viewer for creative portfolios
Implementing an animated gallery for showcasing media items with binomial nomenclature labels
Developing an interactive display component for feature or item collections
ai_summary: A circular gallery component that arranges items around a central point in a radial layout. The gallery responds to scroll events by rotating the items based on scroll progress, and automatically rotates when the user stops scrolling. Features configurable radius and rotation speed, with smooth animation handling and state management for scroll detection.
